sources.title: Ripped (Full Movie) | Russell Peters, Faizon Love | 2017 | Stoner Comedy, Time Travel
sources.description:
Ripped full movie starring Russell Peters and Faizon Love. Two stoners from 1986 are launched into the year 2016 and have to learn how to adapt to present-day living.

Director: Brad Epstein
Writers: Billiam Coronel, Brad Epstein
Stars: Faizon Love, Russell Peters, Kyle Massey, Alex Meneses, Carlos Gomez
2017

Edited for YouTube ad standards

metadata.Plot: Comedy that tells the story of two free spirited stoners who, after smoking some top secret pot created by the CIA in 1986, find themselves catapulted into 2016. With 30 years of their lives lost, our now balding and overweight friends use their uncomplicated enthusiasm to get their lives back on track and to figure out the modern world.
metadata.Actors: Faizon Love, Russell Peters, Alex Meneses
